detaileddescription.para: Critical sections for thread safe operation of UsersStats
Instance of the subsystem that created this interface

memberdef.argsstring: (FOnlineSubsystemAccelByte *InSubsystem)
memberdef.name: FOnlineStatisticAccelByte

detaileddescription.para: Constructor that is invoked by the Subsystem instance to create a user cloud instance

memberdef.argsstring: () override=default
memberdef.name: ~FOnlineStatisticAccelByte

detaileddescription.para: Delegate fired when we delete one statistic for a player.

parameterdescription.para: The Result of statistic deletion process

memberdef.name: QueryStats

parameterdescription.para: User to query as (if applicable)
User to get stats for
Stats to get stats for all specified users
Called when the user's stats have finished being requested and are now available, or when we fail to retrieve the user's stats

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 LocalUserNum, const FUniqueNetIdRef StatsUser, const TArray< FString > &StatNames, const FOnlineStatsQueryUserStatsComplete &Delegate)
memberdef.name: QueryStats

parameterdescription.para: Index of user(or server) to query as
User to get stats for
Stats to get stats for all specified users
Called when the user's stats have finished being requested and are now available, or when we fail to retrieve the user's stats

memberdef.name: QueryStats

parameterdescription.para: Index of user(or server) to query as
User to get stats for
Called when the user's stats have finished being requested and are now available, or when we fail to retrieve the user's stats

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 LocalUserNum, const TArray< FUniqueNetIdRef > &StatsUsers, const TArray< FString > &StatNames, const FOnlineStatsQueryUsersStatsComplete &Delegate)
memberdef.name: QueryStats

detaileddescription.para: Query a one or more user's stats

parameterdescription.para: Index of user(or server) to query as
Users to get stats for
Stats to get stats for all specified users
Called when the user's stats have finished being requested and are now available, or when we fail to retrieve the user's stats

memberdef.argsstring: (const int32 LocalUserNum, const FUniqueNetIdRef StatsUser, const TArray< FString > &StatNames, const FOnlineStatsCreateStatsComplete &Delegate)
memberdef.name: CreateStats

detaileddescription.para: Create a one or more user's stats. Only for request by Game Server

parameterdescription.para: Index of user(server) that is attempting to create the stats
User to create stats for
Stats to create stats for all specified users
Called when the user's stats have finished being created, or when we fail to create the user's stats

memberdef.argsstring: (const TSharedPtr< const FOnlineStatsUserStats > &InUserStats)
memberdef.name: EmplaceStats

detaileddescription.para: Emplace a user's cached stats object

parameterdescription.para: The stats to emplace

memberdef.argsstring: (const TArray< TSharedPtr< const FOnlineStatsUserStats > > &InUsersStats)
memberdef.name: EmplaceStats

parameterdescription.para: The stats to emplace

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetIdRef StatsUserId, const FString &StatsCode)
memberdef.name: RemoveStats

parameterdescription.para: User to remove stats for
The stats id to remove

memberdef.argsstring: (const int32 LocalUserNum, const FUniqueNetIdRef StatsUserId)
memberdef.name: ResetStats

parameterdescription.para: Index of user(server) that is attempting to create the stats
User to reset stats for

memberdef.argsstring: (const int32 LocalUserNum, const TArray< FOnlineStatsUserUpdatedStats > &BulkUpdateMultipleUserStatItems, const FOnUpdateMultipleUserStatItemsComplete &Delegate)
memberdef.name: UpdateStats

detaileddescription.para: Update multiple statistics for multiple users. This request only for Game Server

parameterdescription.para: Index of user(server) that is attempting to update the stats.
Updated Statistics.
Called when the statistics have finished being updated, or when we fail to update the stats

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetIdRef LocalUserId, const TArray< FOnlineStatsUserUpdatedStats > &UpdatedUserStats, const FOnUpdateMultipleUserStatItemsComplete &Delegate)
memberdef.name: UpdateStats

detaileddescription.para: Update multiple statistics for a user. This request only for Game Client This endpoint extends from UpdateStats(const FUniqueNetIdRef LocalUserId, const TArray<FOnlineStatsUserUpdatedStats>& UpdatedUserStats, const FOnlineStatsUpdateStatsComplete& Delegate) Which is providing the messages in 'Details' field after receiving the response.

parameterdescription.para: User to query as (if applicable)
Array of Updated Statistics.
Called when the statistics have finished being updated, or when we fail to update the stats

memberdef.argsstring: (const int32 LocalUserNum, const FUniqueNetIdRef StatsUserId, const FString &StatsCode, const FString &AdditionalKey)
memberdef.name: DeleteStats

detaileddescription.para: Delete one statistic for one user. This request only for Game Server

parameterdescription.para: Index of user(server) that is attempting to delete the stats.
User to delete stat for.
The stats id to remove.
The AdditionalKey relate to statistic.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetIdRef LocalUserId, const FUniqueNetIdRef StatsUser, const FOnlineStatsQueryUserStatsComplete &Delegate) override

memberdef.name: ResetStats

memberdef.argsstring: (FOnlineStatUpdate::EOnlineStatModificationType Strategy)
memberdef.name: ConvertUpdateStrategy

detaileddescription.para: Convert Unreal built-in enum to Accelbyte enum for statistic update strategy

parameterdescription.para: the strategy to update the statistic

detaileddescription.para: Hidden default constructor, the constructor that takes in a subsystem instance should be used instead.
Implementation of Statistic service from AccelByte services
